items.title: Testimonials Marquee
items.description: Scrolling marquee to showcase user testimonials.

items.title: Testimonial
items.description: Display user feedback with author info, avatar, and verified badge.

items.name: github-stars
items.title: GitHub Stars
items.description: Display GitHub repo star count with formatted numbers and full-count tooltip.

items.name: scroll-fade-effect
items.title: Scroll Fade Effect
items.description: Fade content edges as you scroll, for both vertical and horizontal layouts.

@utility scroll-fade-effect-y.mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black 90%), linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, black 100%), linear-gradient(black, black)

@utility scroll-fade-effect-x.mask-image: linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black 90%), linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, black 100%), linear-gradient(black, black)

items.author: ncdai <dai@chanhdai.com>
